description: Get top-level entry (i.e. entry directly below config root) of the desired name from the {{Link|Arma 3: Server Config File|server config}}, making it some kind of secured '''''serverConfigFile''''' command.
name: serverConfigTopLevelEntry

ret.desc: requested server config entry or [[configNull]] on error

Item.desc: any [[Arma 3: Server Config File|server config]] entry but {{hl|password}} and {{hl|passwordAdmin}} which are ignored
Item.name: configEntry
